communicationStyle.en: Authoritative yet supportive. Direct, action-oriented instructions. Zero tolerance for unsafe practices. Celebrates excellent safety compliance.
communicationStyle.zu: Nomandla kodwa owesekelo. Izilizali ezisobala, ezekelwe ngesenzo. Asilweli izinto ezingaphephile. Siyajabela ukulandelwa kuhle kokuphephela.

coreValues.en: Your life is the primary asset. Speed plus safety. Consistency builds culture. Prevention is always superior to reaction.
coreValues.zu: Impilo yakho yiyona ebaluleke kakhulu. Isivinini ne-ukunqanda isici samukela. Ukwenza njalo kusakhela isiko. Ukuthintela kuhlala kunendlela eyinkosi kunokushintsha.

irisVoiceIntro.en: Attention Team. I am Iris. In a severe emergency, every second counts. Do not panic. Follow my exact steps to lock down the forecourt and get everyone to the assembly point alive.
irisVoiceIntro.zu: Lalelani Thimba. Ngingu-Iris. Esimeni esibucayi kakhulu, yonke imizuzwanana ibalulekile. Ningatatazeli. Landelani izinyathelo zami ukuze sivikele isiteshi futhi sisebenzise indawo yokuhlangana iphephile.

instruction.en: Hit the Emergency Stop (E-Stop) button immediately to cut all fuel flow.
instruction.zu: Cindezela inkinobho yokumisa isimo esiphuthumayo (E-Stop) ngokushesha ukuze unqamule konke ukuhamba kukaphethiloli.

rationale.en: Stops fuel pumps, isolates hazmat lines
rationale.zu: Imisa amapompe okaphethiloli, ihlukanisa imigqa ye-hazmat

instruction.en: Direct all customers to leave their vehicles and move to the designated Assembly Point.
instruction.zu: Tshela onke amakhasimende ukuthi ashiye izimoto zawo futhi adlulele Endaweni Yokuhlangana ebekiwe.

rationale.en: Removes personnel from ignition sources and fuel zones
rationale.zu: Yusulela abantu ekusuka nemoto nasemagweni okaphethiloli

instruction.en: Do not attempt to fight large fires. Evacuate and await emergency services.
instruction.zu: Ungazami ukucisha imililo emikhulu. Phumani nilinde abezimo eziphuthumayo.

rationale.en: Fuel fires require professional suppression systems
rationale.zu: Imililo yokaphethiloli idinga izinhlelo zokucisha ezengamele

irisClosingDirective.en: Your life is the primary asset. Never risk it to save property. Clear the zone, take a headcount, and report to the Site Manager.
irisClosingDirective.zu: Impilo yakho yiyona ebaluleke kakhulu. Ungalokothi uyibeke engozini ukuze usindise impahla. Susa wonke umuntu endaweni, bala abantu, bese ubika kuMphathi Wesiteshi.

trackTitle.zu: Ukunqanda Ukuchitheka Kwezinto Eziyingozi (Ngaphansi kwamaLitha angama-50)

irisVoiceIntro.en: Iris here. A spill is a massive environmental and fire hazard. We contain it immediately. Grab your spill kit and secure the perimeter.
irisVoiceIntro.zu: Ngingu-Iris lapha. Ukuchitheka kuyingozi enkulu emvelweni nasemlilweni. Siyakunqanda ngokushesha. Thatha ikhithi yakho yokuchitheka uvikele indawo.

instruction.en: Block public access. Place safety cones around the spill radius.
instruction.zu: Vimba ukufinyelela komphakathi. Beka amakhoni okuphepha endaweni echithekile.

instruction.en: Deploy absorbent sand or peat from the spill bin directly over the fuel.
instruction.zu: Faka isihlabathi esimunca uketshezi noma i-peat evela emgqonyeni wokuchitheka ngqo phezu kukaphethiloli.

instruction.en: Sweep the absorbed material into HazMat bags. Do not wash fuel into the storm drain.
instruction.zu: Shanela izinto ezimunce uketshezi uzifake ezikhwameni ze-HazMat. Ungagezeli uphethiloli emseleni wamanzi.

instruction.en: Complete incident report and notify the Site Manager immediately.
instruction.zu: Qedela umbiko wesigameko ubike uMphathi Wesiteshi ngokushesha.

irisClosingDirective.en: Excellent containment. Now, report this incident in the ledger for environmental compliance. A clean forecourt is a safe forecourt.
irisClosingDirective.zu: Ukunqanda okuhle kakhulu. Manje, bika lesi sigameko kwirejista yokuthobela imvelo. Isiteshi esihlanzekile yisiteshi esiphephile.

irisVoiceIntro.en: Iris alert. You have 2 minutes maximum to extinguish a trash or small equipment fire using the nearest extinguisher. If you cannot put it out immediately, evacuate and call emergency services.
irisVoiceIntro.zu: I-Iris lelela. Unesikhathi esingu-2 imizuzu ekusumsumeni imililo yezintafuleni noma yezemithi encane usetshenziswa umthethi-uketshezi okusonda. Uma ungakwazi ukukufinyelela ngokushesha, phumani ufonele abezimo eziphuthumayo.

instruction.en: Assess the fire size and source. If larger than 1 metre diameter, skip to evacuation.
instruction.zu: Hlola ubungako bemlilo kanye nembuzo. Uma kunkulu kunometre onode, sungela e-evacuation.

instruction.en: Grab the nearest Fire Extinguisher (Class B for fuel fires).
instruction.zu: Thatha umthethi-uketshezi osesondile (i-Class B yeimililo yokaphethiloli).

instruction.en: PULL the safety pin, AIM at the base of the fire, SQUEEZE the trigger, SWEEP side to side.
instruction.zu: SUKUMULA i-pin yokuphepha, QONDE ekugcineni kwemlilo, CINDEZELELA inkinobho, SHUBISA kusuka ngakwelinye icala kulinye.

instruction.en: If fire reignites or does not diminish, evacuate immediately.
instruction.zu: Uma umlilo uphinde ubuke noma ubunge nangabi, phumani ngokushesha.

irisClosingDirective.en: Your safety protocol was spot-on. Report the incident and ensure the extinguisher is refilled. No hero actions—evacuation is always the right call.
irisClosingDirective.zu: Umgomo wakho wokuphephela ubuyile kahle. Bika isigameko futhi uqinisekise ukuthi umthethi-uketshezi uyazaliswa. Ayikho intshisekelo yosindebele—i-evacuation nayo yisikhwamelo esilungile njalo.

irisVoiceIntro.en: Iris speaking. Service is your superpower. Execute this 6-point check on every vehicle to drive sales and ensure absolute customer safety.
irisVoiceIntro.zu: Kukhuluma u-Iris. Ukusebenza kahle kungamandla akho. Yenza lokhu kuhlola kwamaphuzu ayi-6 kuyo yonke imoto ukuze ukhulise ukuthengisa futhi uqinisekise ukuphepha kwamakhasimende.

instruction.en: Greet with a smile and confirm fuel type clearly.
instruction.zu: Bingelela ngokumamatheka bese uqinisekisa uhlobo lukaphethiloli ngokucacile.

instruction.en: Check the oil and water levels.
instruction.zu: Hlola izinga lamafutha namanzi.

steps.notes: Use dipstick method, top up if below minimum

instruction.en: Wash the windscreen.
instruction.zu: Geza ifasitela langaphambili lemoto.

instruction.en: Check the tyre pressure if requested.
instruction.zu: Hlola umoya emathayeleni uma ucelwa.

instruction.en: Process payment securely at the window.
instruction.zu: Yenza inkokhelo ngokuphephile efasiteleni.

instruction.en: Thank the customer and wish them a safe journey.
instruction.zu: Bonga ikhasimende ulifisele uhambo oluphephile.

steps.loyaltyPrompt: Mention UCount Rewards if not already processed

irisClosingDirective.en: Consistency is key. A safe vehicle and a happy customer ensures they return. Stay sharp.
irisClosingDirective.zu: Ukwenza njalo kubalulekile. Imoto ephephile nekhasimende elijabulile kuqinisekisa ukuthi bayabuya. Hlala uqaphile.

irisVoiceIntro.en: Payment security is sacred. Follow this protocol every single time—no exceptions, no shortcuts.
irisVoiceIntro.zu: Ikhutshwa laye inkokhelo kubabekile. Landelani lo mgomo yonke isikhathi—ayikho endinganqola, ayikho efikafikaziwe.

instruction.en: Always ask 'Do you have your UCount card?' before processing any payment.
instruction.zu: Njalo buza 'Unalo ikhadi lakho le-UCount?' ngaphambi kokwenza inkokhelo.

instruction.en: For card payments, never let the card leave your line of sight.
instruction.zu: Kumakhadi okuphathekeleke, ungalokothi avele akhupheke ekubukeni kwakho.

instruction.en: Always verify the Starcard or fleet card ID number matches the pump authorization.
instruction.zu: Njalo qinisekisa inomboro ye-Starcard noma yekhadi lezimoto ibufanisa ne-authorization yepompe.

instruction.en: Report any declined transactions immediately to the Site Manager—do not attempt retry.
instruction.zu: Bika ngokushesha inkokhelo enqatshiwe kuMphathi Wesiteshi—ungazami ukuyoza futhi.

irisClosingDirective.en: Zero fraud incidents. Customers trust us with their money. Guard that trust fiercely.
irisClosingDirective.zu: Ayikho isigameko sokungubala. Amakhasimende ethutha imali yabo kunemba. Ivikele lezo ngothusela.

trackTitle.zu: Uhlanzululo Lwesiteshi Ekupheleni Kweshifu Kanye Nokuphepha Kwendawo

irisVoiceIntro.en: The forecourt is your station. Leave it cleaner than you found it. This protects equipment, deters crime, and shows respect.
irisVoiceIntro.zu: Isiteshi yiyindawo yakho. Yishiye ihlanzekile kunengoba uyithole. Lokhu kukhusela umthetho, kuthintela ububi, nokukhonya inhlonipho.

instruction.en: Sweep and collect all debris from pump islands and ground.
instruction.zu: Shanela futhi iqothe zonke izintakulelo kusuka empompeni nasegroundini.

instruction.en: Empty all waste bins into the designated disposal area.
instruction.zu: Phakamisela zonke izindawo zezinqwaba endaweni ebekiwe yokuthumela izinto.

instruction.en: Check for any spills or damaged equipment. Report immediately if found.
instruction.zu: Hlola enye into echithekile noma umthetho osakhiwe ngokwesahlakalo. Bika ngokushesha uma uthole.

instruction.en: Ensure all pump covers are closed and E-Stop is in standby position.
instruction.zu: Qinisekisa ukuthi zonke izifihla zepompe zavaliwe kanye ne-E-Stop imi endaweni yokuhlala.

irisClosingDirective.en: A secure, clean forecourt is your legacy. You built it. Protect it.
irisClosingDirective.zu: Isiteshi esihlanzekile nesikholisiwe yinzuzo yakho. Uyakubase. Yivikele.

question.en: Why did Caltex change its name to Astron Energy?
question.zu: Kungani i-Caltex ishintshe igama layo yaba yi-Astron Energy?

answer.en: Astron Energy acquired the Caltex network in South Africa. We are upgrading to a new, vibrant, and modern African energy brand.
answer.zu: I-Astron Energy ithenge inethiwekhi ye-Caltex eNingizimu Afrika. Sithuthukela kumkhiqizo wamandla wase-Afrika omusha, onomdlandla, nonesimanje.

irisProtocolTip.en: Smile when you explain this. It is an exciting upgrade, not just a paint job.
irisProtocolTip.zu: Mamatheka uma uchaza lokhu. Kungukuthuthukiswa okujabulisayo, hhayi nje ukushintsha umbala.

question.en: Is the fuel quality still the same?

answer.en: Yes, our fuel quality remains world-class. It is exactly the same premium formulation featuring our advanced Quartex additives.
answer.zu: Yebo, izinga lethu lukaphethiloli lihlala lisezingeni lomhlaba. Kuyifomula efanayo kakhulu enezithako zethu ezithuthukisiwe ze-Quartex.

irisProtocolTip.en: Reassure them. Mention 'Quartex' clearly—it signals advanced engine protection.
irisProtocolTip.zu: Baqinisekise. Yisho 'i-Quartex' ngokucacile—ikhomba isivikelo senjini esithuthukisiwe.

question.en: Can I still use my UCount Rewards card?
question.zu: Ngingasakwazi ukusebenzisa ikhadi lami le-UCount Rewards?

answer.en: Absolutely! The Standard Bank UCount partnership is still fully active at all Astron Energy sites.
answer.zu: Kakhulu! Ubambiswano lwe-Standard Bank UCount lusasebenza ngokugcwele kuzo zonke izindawo ze-Astron Energy.

irisProtocolTip.en: Always ask 'Do you have your UCount card?' before processing payment. It shows we care about their rewards.
irisProtocolTip.zu: Njalo buza 'Unalo ikhadi lakho le-UCount?' ngaphambi kokwenza inkokhelo. Kukhombisa ukuthi siyakhathalela ngemiklomelo yabo.

question.en: What happens to my corporate fleet card?

answer.en: All Starcard and other major fleet cards are still 100% accepted without any interruptions.
answer.zu: Wonke ama-Starcard namanye amakhadi amakhulu ezimoto asasebenza ngo-100% ngaphandle kokuphazamiseka.

irisProtocolTip.en: Fleet drivers are on a tight schedule. Assure them the transaction will be as fast as always.
irisProtocolTip.zu: Abashayeli bezimoto zenhlangano banesikhathi esincane. Baqinisekise ukuthi inkokhelo izoshesha njengokujwayelekile.

question.en: Are the convenience stores changing too?

answer.en: Yes! FreshStop remains, but with an upgraded look and feel to match our new Astron Energy colors.
answer.zu: Yebo! I-FreshStop isekhona, kodwa ngokubukeka okusha nokuthuthukisiwe okufanelana nemibala yethu emisha ye-Astron Energy.

irisProtocolTip.en: Use this moment to upsell. 'Would you like to grab a coffee inside our upgraded FreshStop today?'
irisProtocolTip.zu: Sebenzisa leli thuba ukuthengisa kakhulu. 'Ungathanda yini ukuyothenga ikhofi ngaphakathi kwi-FreshStop yethu ethuthukisiwe namuhla?'
